text: The security assessment documentation shall be:

options.text: Forwarded to the public maritime archive
Kept on ship safely in a secure location
Displayed publicly in the crew mess room

explanation: The Ship Security Assessment (SSA) documentation, forming the basis of the SSP, contains sensitive information about vulnerabilities and threats. It must be kept secure on board the ship and with the Company, restricted to authorized personnel only, to prevent unauthorized disclosure or misuse.
